p.em: Memory Safety Analysis: Spatial vs Temporal Aliasing

div.p: TEMPORAL ALIASING Stale ref_A can now corrupt New Entity!

ol.li: Wide Generations: Use 32-bit generations (u32). Wraparound takes years of uptime.
Generation Skip: On MAX_GEN, mark slot as "Dead/Tombstone" and never reuse.
Panic on Overflow: In debug builds, assert gen < MAX_GEN.
Handle Scrubbing: Invalidate all handles on major state transitions.
